steps.title: Compare the two locations
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between the Isthmus of Panama and the Isthmus of Ierapetra. A useful answer must mention both named isthmuses and place different facts about them side by side. The notes give a clear contrast: Panama is in Central America, while Ierapetra is in the Mediterranean Sea.

steps.title: Keep the contrast explicit
steps.content:
• Choice A - The Isthmus of Ierapetra is an isthmus, or land bridge.: This mentions only Ierapetra and gives a category, so it does not compare the two places.
  • Choice C - There is an isthmus, or land bridge, located in Central America.: This mentions Central America but does not name or contrast the Isthmus of Ierapetra.
  • Choice D - An isthmus, or land bridge, is a strip of land that connects two larger pieces of land across an expanse of water.: This defines an isthmus in general instead of emphasizing a difference between the two examples.
The sentence with both locations directly contrasts the two isthmuses. The answer is B.
